/usr/local/cuda/bin/nvcc -forward-unknown-to-host-compiler  --generate-code=arch=compute_75,code=[compute_75,sm_75] -Xcompiler=-fPIC -Wno-deprecated-gpu-targets -shared -dlink CMakeFiles/cublas_benchmark.dir/04_cublas_benchmark.cu.o -o CMakeFiles/cublas_benchmark.dir/cmake_device_link.o   -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
